a.xlink:title: Executes the appropriate solver based on the simulation configuration.
Identifies the secondary neighbors of a given cell to evaluate second gradients.
Reads the input grid file and constructs physical cells, evaluates face areas, normals,...
Sorts a set of points in anti-clockwise order around their centroid.
Computes the dissipative flux for a given cell and face using the RICCA method.
Calculates the average convective flux at a given face of a cell.
Computes the Alpha parameter for the RICCA condition based on input variables.
Computes the dissipative flux for a given cell and face using the second-order RICCA method.
Computes the second-order limited slopes and reconstructs variables for a given cell and face.
Computes the MinMod limiter for three input values and updates the result in the provided reference.
Calculate the gradient on a face of a cell.
